prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-1PCKTOOLHOLDER-BROWN Product Type: UTILITY_HOLSTER_POUCH Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 9 Inch One Pocket Top Grain Leather Tool Holder with Belt Clip, Dark Brown Description: Do you have a favorite tool or high traffic tool that you need separated from other tools on your tool belt? Or do you just need a little more room on an already full tool belt? Whatever your end goal is, the ToolTreaux top grain leather tool holder can help.

The v-shape pocket measures six inches deep with secure metal snap closure, and can be worn on any belt up to 2.5 inches wide. And, while the tool holder features a tunnel loop design, it also comes with a strong and sturdy built in metal belt clip, if you wish to attach to your person, a separate tool bag or other.

Constructed from top grain leather, the high quality fabrication ensures longevity in the field and across many projects; the tool holder may be stiff upon arrival, but will soften with time and use.
With one main pocket, it's a versatile tool holder that can hold pliers, cutters, a flashlight and much more, depending on the project at hand. Ideal for separating a favorite or repeatedly used tool from other tools on your tool belt, this top grain leather tool holder from ToolTreaux gives you quick and easy specific tool access that is organized and secure.

Dimensions: 9 x 3.5 x 2 inches
Material: Top Grain Leather
Tunnel Loop: 2.5 inches wide
Pockets: One with 6 inch depth Search Terms: gifts for dad Tool belt accessories leather tool belt boyfriend fathers day gifts framers carpenter electrician tool belt DIY mens stocking stuffers Small tool pouch with belt clip edc leather belt organizer construction tools plumber gardening Features: - ONE POCKET TOOL HOLDER: Durable leather tool holder with belt loop is a great addition to any tool belt to house extra tools; pocket measures six inches deep with secure snap closure and can be worn on any belt up to 2.5 inches wide - TOP GRAIN LEATHER: High quality top grain leather ensures longevity in the field; while the tool holder may be stiff upon arrival, it will soften with time and use - BUILT IN BELT CLIP: If not needed on as tool belt, this high quality leather tool holder features a sturdy, built in metal belt clip to allow for easy attachment to your person or other tool bag as needed - TOOL BELT ACCESSORIES: Versatile leather tool holder with tunnel loop design and belt clip gives you fast and quick access to favorite or high traffic tools, separated from others on your tool belt - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9 x 3.5 x 2 inches; Color: Brown; V-Shape Pocket: 6 inches; Material: Leather; Weight: 0.25lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 9 Inch Brown Leather Tool Holder with Belt Clip

tokens.name: Leather Tool Holder with Belt Clip

anthropic.title_differentiation: Top Grain Leather, One Pocket, 6 Inch Depth, Metal Belt Clip, Tunnel Loop, Tool Belt Accessory
